body_txt: The tongue, like the hands and feet , is a highly innervated area of the body, and also has an extremely rich blood supply, as to be expected of one of the body's sensory organs. For obvious reasons, injuries inflicted on it are gonna hurt. Thus, this trope encompasses damage done to the tongue of any kind, including the following:  Naturally with this trope, you may expect Nausea Fuel and/or Nightmare Fuel . It overlaps with Attack the Mouth if done deliberately. A Sister Trope of Eye Scream , and Fingore . Compare Overly Long Tongue . One of the many injury types that qualifies as Climactic Maiming . Unrelated to Tongue Twister unless we're being literal .
